column1: # qc705 custom partition table for the ESP32-S3FN8 (8MB flash).
# Adds a "fatfs" data partition that the storage service mounts at /storage for
# settings (Station.txt) and the daily ADIF QSO logs
# stock singleapp_large table had no such partition
# ("Firmware does not own storage") and settings/logs were silently dropped.
# Also grows the app partition (was 1500K / ~95% full) to 3M for headroom.
